sections.heading: About the Role
sections.body: neTransform is seeking a Senior Program Manager to lead complex technology transformation initiatives for federal agency clients. The ideal candidate brings deep federal consulting experience, strong stakeholder management skills, and a proven track record of delivering large-scale programs on time and within budget.

sections.heading: Key Responsibilities
items: Lead program planning, execution, and governance across multi-workstream federal technology engagements
Manage stakeholder relationships at senior levels across government and contractor teams
Develop and maintain integrated master schedules, risk registers, and executive status reporting
Drive issue resolution and decision-making to keep programs aligned with mission objectives
Support business development activities including proposal contributions and client presentations
Mentor junior team members and contribute to internal knowledge-sharing initiatives

sections.heading: Required Qualifications
items: 10+ years of program management experience, with at least 5 years in federal consulting environments
PMP certification required; ITIL, COBIT, or Agile/SAFe certifications a strong plus
Proven experience managing programs at federal agencies (DoD, DHS, IRS, or similar)
Strong command of PMBOK methodologies, Agile frameworks, and earned value management
Excellent written and verbal communication skills with executive-level briefing experience
Bachelor's degree in a relevant field required

sections.heading: Preferred Qualifications
items: Active security clearance (Secret or higher preferred)
Experience with cloud modernization, ERP implementations, or IT infrastructure programs
MBA or advanced degree in a relevant field
Prior experience at a Big 4 or major federal consulting firm
